flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Woodland Community College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $7.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Woodland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (15.7% → 0.0%).
